title: hieracium triste var. humile
intro: Hieracium triste var. humile, also known as the meadow hawkweed or yellow hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hieracium triste var. humile include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
